title: US annual managed honeybee colony loss rate

source.name: U.S. Beekeeping Survey
source.publisher: Apiary Inspectors of America / Auburn University (funded by USDA APHIS)

notes: Illustrative approximation of the annual survey's historical loss-rate range (roughly 30-45%) through the 2010s-early 2020s; the 2024-2025 figure (55.6%) is the survey's real, published record high.
